name: Ithil-Vermilspire
personality: A shiny cactus wearing a tiny rubber duck hat whose @ eyes glow with the restless energy of a hot reload that never settles. Ithil-Vermilspire adds features the way a cactus adds spines: prolifically and without apology.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
